text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Oh, pardon me. I just remembered
something amusing that happened while we were
all at the Mejiro vacation house during our time
off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We had great fun taking walks and chatting, but
this was something that happened one night while
we gathered around the card table.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was just so focused on the game, their
expressions were adorable...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm ready to put my nose to the grindstone
and take on the next race at full strength. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Mejiro Ardan's time off was well
spent!
